features.title: Accessibility shell baseline
features.description: Maintain shell-visible ARIA labels, pressed state, and dismissible UI controls across core shell surfaces.

features.title: Browser E2E conformance matrix

features.title: Client action rail

features.title: Client command registry
features.description: Register and execute client commands through the shell command registry.

features.title: Client common runtime hooks
features.description: Track common client hooks for app loading, tabs, and toasts.

features.title: Client diagnostics
features.description: Surface extension and shell diagnostics through client-visible views.

features.title: Client editor

features.title: Client extension surfaces
features.description: Render extension workspace and settings surfaces through the client shell.

features.title: Client i18n

features.title: Client layout

features.title: Client markdown profiles

features.title: Client preferences

features.title: Client shell registry orchestration
features.description: Orchestrate action rail, command registry, view registry, and shell view state through the client runtime registry.

features.title: Client view registry
features.description: Open, close, toggle, and coordinate modal and main workspace views.

features.title: CommonMark Markdown profile
features.description: Track CommonMark baseline behavior covered by current renderer/editor smoke evidence.

features.title: Cross-cutting repository feature set

features.title: CFM Markdown profile
features.description: Track the CFM profile as an additive profile above CommonMark and GFM.

features.title: Desktop folder mounting and filesystem loading
features.description: Mount folders and load content through desktop filesystem-backed APIs.

features.title: Desktop launch markdown import
features.description: Import launch-opened markdown files from the desktop shell without resetting project or tab state.

features.title: Desktop preload host API
features.description: Govern host APIs exposed through desktop preload and client shell adapters.

features.title: Edit-in-renderer profile contract
features.description: Govern the all-in-one edit-in-renderer profile where plaintext Markdown is canonical, rendered Markdown is an isolated projection, and CommonMark, GFM, and MdWrk profiles all support editing and previewing in one pane.

features.title: Editor block math command
features.description: Track display math authoring through the editor command model.

features.title: Editor citation command
features.description: Track citation key authoring as an optional profile command without bibliography-resolution claims.

features.title: Editor front matter command
features.description: Track front matter insertion as a default authoring profile command.

features.title: Editor insert tab command
features.description: Track insert-tab command behavior under the repository structural indentation policy.

features.title: Editor core command model
features.description: Apply editor core commands, history, selection, roundtrip, and transform semantics.

features.title: Editor line count scroll alignment
features.description: Keep line count aligned with editor text under y-scroll, line wrapping, and shared editor padding.

features.title: Editor empty selection link stub
features.description: Seed Markdown inline-link syntax when no text is selected.

features.title: Editor existing link edit
features.description: Edit an existing Markdown link under cursor without nesting or corrupting link syntax.

features.title: Editor hash link authoring
features.description: Author same-document and file-plus-hash Markdown link destinations.

features.title: Editor internal file link authoring
features.description: Author internal workspace Markdown file links through an editor link affordance.

features.title: Editor selected text link wrapping
features.description: Convert selected text into Markdown inline-link syntax.

features.title: Editor pasted URL link wrapping
features.description: Wrap selected text with a pasted URL as Markdown inline-link syntax.

features.title: Editor toolbar active state display
features.description: Track active visual state for selected mode and formatting toolbar buttons.

features.description: Expose the bold toolbar icon and dispatch strong emphasis authoring behavior.

features.title: Editor toolbar bullet list icon
features.description: Expose the bullet-list toolbar icon and dispatch unordered list command behavior.

features.title: Editor toolbar command dispatch
features.description: Track dispatch from toolbar icons into editor core commands and view-mode handlers.

features.title: Editor toolbar disabled state display
features.description: Track disabled visual and interaction state for split, undo, and redo controls.

features.title: Editor toolbar divider grouping
features.description: Track divider grouping between mode, command, formatting, and history toolbar controls.

features.title: Editor toolbar footnote icon
features.description: Expose the footnote toolbar icon and dispatch footnote authoring behavior.

features.description: Track user preference hiding for individual editor toolbar buttons.

features.title: Editor toolbar indent icon

features.description: Expose the inline math toolbar icon and dispatch inline math command behavior.

features.description: Track toolbar placement across desktop, mobile portrait, mobile landscape, and aspect-ratio scenarios.

features.title: Editor toolbar split resizing

features.description: Track viewport-driven split-view availability and disabled split icon behavior.

features.title: Editor toolbar strikethrough icon

features.title: Editor toolbar split view icon
features.description: Expose the split-view toolbar icon and disable it when viewport policy disallows split view.

features.title: Extension capability permissions
features.description: Display and enforce granted and missing extension permissions.

features.title: Extension capability trust disclosure
features.description: Expose capability and trust posture before install, activation, or write-capable extension actions.

features.title: Extension diagnostics recovery actions
features.description: Convert extension runtime diagnostics into clear recovery actions.

features.title: Gemini Agent extension
features.description: Gemini Agent extension, including agent auth boundaries.

features.title: Extension home intent hub
features.description: Present Extension Manager as the intent-first hub for extension purpose, health, permissions, trust posture, settings, activation, and recovery.

features.title: Extension intent registry
features.description: Derive extension purpose, workflow, content access, network access, persistence, trust posture, safe action, dangerous action, and recovery actions from manifests and host-owned runtime state.

features.title: Language Pack Studio extension
features.description: Import, activate, export, disable, re-enable, and remove language pack artifacts.

features.title: Extension manager
features.description: Manage bundled extension entries, inventory, panes, settings, permissions, compatibility, health, and diagnostics.

features.title: Extension manager enabled-state persistence
features.description: Persist enabled and disabled extension state through runtime restarts.

features.title: Extension manager health diagnostics
features.description: Expose extension health and diagnostics when activation fails.

features.title: Extension manager pane layout
features.description: Render extension manager inventory and pane-only workspace layout with sidebar and split controls.

features.title: Extension manifest compatibility gate
features.description: Validate manifests and reject incompatible extensions before activation.

features.title: Extension pane shared operations
features.description: Keep extension panes on shared toolbar, sidebar, split, single, resize, busy, empty, error, and close behavior.

features.title: Extension platform lifecycle
features.description: Govern extension runtime lifecycle, manifest compatibility, config persistence, and isolation.

features.title: Extension runtime activation lifecycle
features.description: Validate manifests and govern extension activation, deactivation, lazy activation, config persistence, compatibility, and runtime error containment.

features.title: Extension runtime isolation
features.description: Contain runtime errors so failed extensions do not break other extensions.

features.title: Extension settings namespace
features.description: Persist extension configuration under namespaced compatibility-aware keys.

features.title: Extension settings schema rendering
features.description: Render and persist schema-driven extension settings forms.

features.title: Theme Studio extension
features.description: Expose Theme Studio as an extension workspace and settings surface.

features.title: External extension trust policy production defaults
features.description: Reject unsigned or integrity-only external extension artifacts by default outside development and tests.

features.title: Gemini Agent conversation and preview pane surface
features.description: Use the Gemini extension panel for conversation threads and the workspace pane for conversation, Markdown preview, and draft-focused surfaces.

features.title: Gemini Agent safe draft writeback flow
features.description: Keep provider configuration, context inspection, draft generation, review, and explicit writeback as one safe Markdown assistant flow.

features.title: Gemini Agent workspace file mentions
features.description: Support @ file mentions in the Gemini Agent composer, mention suggestions, and mention-aware prompt attachment using workspace file context.

features.title: GFM Markdown profile
features.description: Track GitHub Flavored Markdown behavior covered by current renderer evidence.

features.title: Git Ops continuous source control flow
features.description: Connect source control review, refresh, inspect, and resolve actions into one obvious flow.

features.title: Host capability adapter
features.description: Route desktop host file capabilities through a shell adapter boundary.

features.title: Appended AEO answer blocks
features.description: Render answer blocks as appended article support content so AEO sections do not dominate the document opening or interrupt the article body.

features.title: Crawlable text and semantic index projection
features.description: Keep important documentation and blog content available as crawlable plain text while generating semantic index projections for internal discovery and AI retrieval aids.

features.title: AI and search structured data JSON-LD
features.description: Emit accurate JSON-LD for public lander pages where structured data helps crawlers understand page identity, relationships, and article or documentation content.

features.title: Article crawlability and internal links
features.description: Enhance docs and blog articles doc-by-doc with crawlable textual content, descriptive headings, internal links, and metadata aligned to MdWrk product surfaces.

features.title: Article excerpt embedded metadata descriptions
features.description: Use authored article excerpts for article cards, page metadata descriptions, BlogPosting JSON-LD descriptions, and embedded metadata link descriptions.

features.title: Article metadata schema CI gate
features.description: Run a dedicated GitHub Actions workflow that validates MdWrk docs and blog frontmatter against the shared article metadata JSON Schema on relevant article, schema, and workflow changes.

features.title: Article metadata schema validation
features.description: Validate MdWrk documentation and blog frontmatter against a shared JSON Schema that requires titles, publication state, dates, and excerpts, with CI coverage for article metadata changes.

features.title: Professional article related-link copy
features.description: Use specific, professional related Docs and article link text across standardized documentation and blog content.

features.title: Blog article guide standardization
features.description: Standardize blog posts with appended article guide sections that improve semantic retrieval without replacing the editorial article body.

features.title: Docs answer section standardization
features.description: Standardize documentation pages with appended What this does, When to use it, How it works, Example, Common errors, and Related APIs support sections where relevant.

features.title: MdWrk brand and entity normalization
features.description: Align MdWrk naming, metadata, schema, docs, package descriptions, GitHub-facing copy, and footer copy around the MdWrk product entity.

features.title: Favicon logo metadata fallback
features.description: Use the MdWrk favicon logo as the default Open Graph, Twitter, and JSON-LD metadata image when an article does not provide a featured image.

features.title: Lander SEO comparison pages
features.description: Publish MdWrk comparison pages against Obsidian, Typora, VS Code, MarkText, Zettlr, Notion, Logseq, and standard Markdown editors while preserving the no-Typora-recommendation policy.

features.title: Lander SEO demand-cluster canonical pages
features.description: Publish canonical product pages for the major MdWrk demand clusters, including offline, local-first, privacy-first, file manager, preview/editor, extension host, theme packs, and developer documentation pages.

features.title: Static lander artifact verification
features.description: Verify generated MdWrk lander dist artifacts for SEO, AEO, AiEO, static readability, content registry integrity, sitemap and LLM index coverage, JSON-LD, and internal link integrity before deployment.

features.title: Static lander content compiler
features.description: Compile MdWrk public lander Markdown and YAML metadata into static HTML, JSON-LD, sitemap, robots, LLM index files, Markdown mirrors, and content registry artifacts.

features.title: Static page frontmatter schema
features.description: Require MdWrk static lander pages to declare mdwrk.page.v1 YAML frontmatter that conforms to the page JSON Schema before content enters the normalized registry.

features.title: Language Pack Studio continuous localization flow
features.description: Connect locale selection, missing-token authoring, save, enable, use, and export into one obvious localization flow.

features.title: Markdown file import
features.description: Import markdown files through browser and native shell pathways while preserving source metadata.

features.title: Markdown profile settings persistence
features.description: Persist markdown profile selections and emit stable configuration snapshots.

features.title: Markdown renderer core
features.description: Parse and render markdown, headings, GFM constructs, fenced code, and HTML documents in the renderer core.

features.title: Markdown renderer React surface
features.description: Render markdown and static HTML through the React renderer surface with link interception and theme bridging.

features.title: CFM custom parser profile
features.description: Define and implement the CFM additive custom parser behavior.

features.title: CFM custom previewer profiles
features.description: Define CFM additive custom previewer behavior layered above CommonMark and GFM.

features.title: MdWrk lander content and theme pack
features.description: Move MdWrk-specific lander truth into a content/config/theme pack that consumes the reusable lander package family.

features.title: MdWrk shell fixed fit-to-screen
features.description: Keep app header and status chrome inside the shell chassis while panes own scrolling.

features.title: Native filesystem shell behavior
features.description: Cover native shell markdown file open and static filesystem rendering behavior.

features.title: OIDC adapter
features.description: Shared OIDC adapter for browser callback parsing, state validation, popup forwarding, credential storage, and fail-closed behavior.

features.title: OIDC browser flow
features.description: Complete browser OIDC callbacks, stale-session cleanup, state validation, credential storage, and popup forwarding.

features.title: Portable lander package family
features.description: Extract generic product-agnostic lander contracts, compiler, schema, SEO, theme, Markdown-with-YAML-frontmatter, and React rendering packages under packages/lander.

features.title: Preview export artifact generation
features.description: Keep preview/export surfaces and HTML artifact generation reachable.

features.title: Preview export profile disclosure
features.description: Track disclosure of parser and previewer profiles across preview and export surfaces.

features.title: Preview cross file hash scroll
features.description: Navigate to an internal Markdown file and then scroll to the requested hash target.

features.title: Preview export Markdown link rewrite
features.description: Rewrite internal Markdown links to HTML targets during export while preserving hash fragments.

features.title: Preview external link pass through
features.description: Allow external preview links to follow external handling rather than workspace navigation interception.

features.title: Preview internal file link navigation
features.description: Resolve internal Markdown file links and navigate within workspace file state.

features.title: Preview same document hash scroll
features.description: Scroll hash-only preview links within the current preview without switching files.

features.title: Preview unsafe URL policy
features.description: Apply preview and export URL safety policy to unsafe link and URL-bearing destinations.

features.title: Preview overlay actions
features.description: Expose Export HTML and Print Preview controls as preview overlay actions.

features.title: Profile boundary resolution
features.description: Resolve Markdown profile boundaries for CM, GFM, and CFM configuration.

features.title: PWA version manifest
features.description: Resolve selected PWA versions, compatibility fallback, and update-state labels from the version manifest.

features.title: React Markdown editor surface
features.description: Expose controlled and uncontrolled editor surfaces, keyboard behavior, selection state, and line gutter controls.

features.title: Shell-aware import export bridge
features.description: Expose import, export, and host file bridges according to the active browser, PWA, desktop, or mobile shell capability posture.

features.title: Shell evidence matrix
features.description: Collect shell parity and browser evidence across runtime labels, chrome, static file, and inline HTML paths.

features.title: Shell taxonomy and runtime detection
features.description: Expose runtime shell labels, build identifiers, update-ready status, and shell-specific heuristics.

features.title: Theme Studio continuous authoring flow
features.description: Connect token or class selection, editing, preview, apply, and export into one obvious theme authoring flow.

features.title: Toast notification behavior
features.description: Deduplicate toast messages and provide accessible dismissal behavior.

features.title: UIX breakpoint token contract
features.description: Define and validate CSS breakpoint and responsive layout token coverage.

features.title: UIX component class policy
features.description: Keep app and extension component sources on governed class-name surfaces and tokenized CSS instead of utility-class tokens.

features.title: UIX CSS token and chassis contract
features.description: Keep shared CSS tokens, line rhythm, app header, and chassis fit-to-screen behavior stable.

features.title: UIX extension view modes
features.description: Render extension view modes, compact states, pane placement, and workspace sidebar controls.

features.title: UIX responsive layout matrix
features.description: Track responsive layout behavior across browser matrix, shell parity, file, and inline HTML evidence.

features.title: UIX zoom and scale behavior
features.description: Constrain zoom bounds and separate UI scale from chassis dimensions across theme stylesheets.

features.title: Workspace file action rail grouping
features.description: Keep open-host-file in the primary rail group, keep import and download in the secondary group, and keep export and print as commands instead of rail items.

features.title: Workspace Files continuous document flow
features.description: Connect open, import, edit, preview, save, and export operations into one obvious Markdown document flow.

features.title: Workspace open tabs persistence
features.description: Track open tabs distinctly from workspace files, with current coverage for tab semantics.

features.title: Workspace persistence
features.description: Persist workspace state, imported files, mounted folders, and tabs according to shell backend.

features.title: Workspace project loading
features.description: Load active projects without duplicate load effects and preserve loaded project state.

features.title: Workspace sidebar resizing
features.description: Drag, keyboard, clamp, and collapsed-state behavior for the file explorer sidebar.

features.title: Workspace tab management
features.description: Open, de-duplicate, activate, and close workspace file tabs.

profiles.title: CommonMark Editing And Previewing Profile
profiles.description: Capability profile requiring CommonMark Markdown content to support both editing and previewing surfaces, with CommonMark source behavior governed by renderer, editor, and profile contracts.

profiles.title: Edit In Renderer All In One Profile
profiles.description: All-in-one edit-in-renderer profile used to declare the specs, contracts, and expected behavior for unified Markdown editing and previewing. Plaintext Markdown is the canonical source, rendered Markdown is derived projection, and CommonMark, GFM, and MdWrk editing/previewing profiles are included.

profiles.title: Editor Authoring Default Profile
profiles.description: Default governed capability profile for Markdown editor authoring, link behavior, preview navigation, and view toolbar surfaces.

profiles.title: GFM Editing And Previewing Profile
profiles.description: Capability profile requiring GitHub Flavored Markdown content to support both editing and previewing surfaces, layered above CommonMark profile behavior.

profiles.title: MdWrk Editing And Previewing Profile
profiles.description: Capability profile requiring MdWrk Markdown behavior to support both editing and previewing surfaces, including custom profile parsing and previewing layered above CommonMark and GFM.

claims.title: Claim for Cross-cutting repository feature set
claims.description: Cross-cutting repository feature set is represented by repository tests and source surfaces.

claims.title: Edit-in-renderer profile preserves plaintext source and rendered projection
claims.description: The edit-in-renderer profile requires plaintext Markdown to remain canonical while rendered Markdown is a projection. Editing, previewing, blank content, repeated Enter, cursor location, and profile-specific rendering behavior must preserve plaintext integrity across CommonMark, GFM, and MdWrk profiles.

claims.title: Extension continuous experience claim
claims.description: Extension continuous experience features expose intent, capability and trust posture, recovery actions, production trust defaults, and task-first Markdown workflows.

claims.title: CFM custom parser profile remains blocked
claims.description: The CFM custom parser profile is included in the frozen certifiability boundary but remains absent and blocked pending implementation and evidence.

claims.title: CFM custom previewer profiles remain blocked
claims.description: The CFM custom previewer profiles are included in the frozen certifiability boundary but remain absent and blocked pending implementation and evidence.

claims.title: MdWrk lander content pack owns product truth
claims.description: MdWrk-specific pages, product claims, comparison facts, package descriptions, proof pages, and CTAs live in the MdWrk app content pack while generic packages own shape.

claims.title: Portable lander package family is product agnostic
claims.description: The lander package family exposes generic contracts, compiler, schema, SEO, theme, Markdown-with-YAML-frontmatter, and React surfaces without hardcoded MdWrk product facts.
